_comment: Offline typosquat backstop for dep-guard.py — the top-N most-downloaded package names per ecosystem (npm, PyPI, NuGet, Go, Cargo), regenerated by scripts/gen_popular_packages.py (see its _generated metadata for sources + date). GENERATED, not hand-curated (Go excepted — see _generated.sources.go); a near-match is a material finding to adjudicate, not a verdict — the live registry is authoritative. A bounded top-N (<=500/ecosystem) is a deliberate BACKSTOP that covers the real typosquat targets while staying far from a full registry mirror (millions of names) — intentionally capped to hold the advisory false-positive rate low. Forked byte-identical alongside each dep-guard.py copy (check.py IDENTICAL_PAIRS).

nuget.note: NuGet Azure Search query service, re-sorted by totalDownloads desc

go.note: curated seed — Go has no public download-ranked registry API; hand-maintained GO_SEED
